{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/silver_ingot.png
|durability=500
|mass_damage=8
|hardness_damage=2
|swing_speed=2.1
|tags=metal, precious
|modifiers=N/A
}}

== Obtaining ==
Silver ore can be obtained between 

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Items]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Ingots]]
[[Category:Precious Materials]]
